title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - No
scenario: Verify that tapping "No" on the Restore Defaults confirmation popup closes the popup without resetting the device.
steps: Open Lens App with a headset connected, go to Device Settings, tap Reset Device tab.
Verify "Restore Defaults" field with "Restore" button and explanatory text, and "Clear Trusted Devices" field with "Clear" button and text.
Verify a confirmation popup appears with "Are you sure you want to restore to default settings?" and two buttons: "No" and "Yes".
Verify the popup closes, device is not reset, and user remains on the same screen.
expected: Popup closes, device is not reset, and user remains on the same screen.
